headline: Intuitive Surgical Extends Southern Europe Reach As Stock Trades Below Targets
summary: Intuitive Surgical is acquiring the da Vinci and Ion distribution business in Southern Europe. The move gives the company direct control over sales and service for its robotic-assisted surgery platforms in the region. The change is aimed at improving customer support, system availability, and access for hospitals and clinicians. For investors watching NasdaqGS:ISRG, this deal comes as the shares trade around $471.91 after a 16.0% decline year to date and a 9.2% decline over the past year...
